zh.lifeSummary: 當Royal B. Coolbroth於1800年5月8日出生在美國緬因州約克布斯頓時，他的父親Benjamin Coolbroth31歲，母親Elizabeth Fenderson26歲。他於1824年與Mehitable Morrison在美國緬因州約克利默里克結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1840年住在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可劍橋大學默里 利默里克且在美國緬因州沃爾多貝爾法斯特住了大約10年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Royal B. Coolbroth于1800年5月8日出生在美国缅因州約克布斯頓时，他的父亲Benjamin Coolbroth31岁，母亲Elizabeth Fenderson26岁。他于1824年与Mehitable Morrison在美国缅因州約克利默里克结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1840年住在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可劍橋大學默里 利默里克且在美国缅因州沃爾多貝爾法斯特住了大约10年。

historicEvents.description: France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.
Historical Boundaries: 1827: Waldo, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The Black Hawk War
historicEvents.description: Convinced that a group of Native American tribes were hostile, The United States formed a frontier militia to stop them in their tracks. Even though Black Hawk was hoping to avoid bloodshed while trying to resettle on tribal land, U.S. officials opened fire on the Native Americans. Black Hawk then responded to this confrontation by successfully attacking the militia at the Battle of Stillman's Run and then left northward. After a few months the militia caught up with Black Hawk and his men and defeated them at the Battle of Wisconsin Heights. While being weakened by hunger, injuries and desertion, Black Hawk and the rest of the many native survivors retreated towards the Mississippi. Unfortunately, Black Hawk and other leaders were later captured when they surrendered to the US forces and were then imprisoned for a year.
Historical Boundaries: 1839: Aroostock, Maine, United States
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The Battle at Gettysburg
historicEvents.description: The Battle of Gettysburg involved the largest number of casualties of the entire Civil war and is often described as the war's turning point. Between 46,000 and 51,000 soldiers lost their lives during the three-day Battle. To honor the fallen soldiers, President Abraham Lincoln read his historic Gettysburg Address and helped those listening by redefining the purpose of the war.

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.

historicEvents.title: Sinking of USS Maine
historicEvents.description: During the Cuban War for Independence, the USS Maine had been sent to Havana to look out for the interests of the United States. On February 15, 1898, at approximately 21:40, an explosion on USS Maine was caused by roughly 5 long tons of powder. The front of the ship was demolished and the remains quickly sunk to the bottom of the ocean. 260 men lost their lives in the explosion itself, with at least six more dying afterwards from related injuries. The event kicked off an atmosphere of contention that would eventually lead to the Spanish-American War.

en.lifeSummary: When Royal B. Coolbroth was born on 8 May 1800, in Buxton, York, Maine, United States, his father, Benjamin Coolbroth, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Fenderson, was 26. He married Mehitable Morrison in 1824, in Limerick, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United States in 1840 and Belfast, Waldo, Maine, United States for about 10 years.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Royal B. Coolbroth est né le 8 mai 1800, à Buxton, York, Maine, États-Unis, son père, Benjamin Coolbroth, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fenderson, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mehitable Morrison en 1824, à Limerick, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis en 1840 et à Belfast, Waldo, Maine, États-Unis pendant environ 10 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Royal B. Coolbroth am 8. Mai 1800 in Buxton, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Benjamin Coolbroth 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Fenderson 26. Er hat 1824 in Limerick, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Mehitable Morrison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1840 hat er in New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt, und ungefähr 10 Jahre lang hat er in Belfast, Waldo, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Royal B. Coolbroth è nato il il 8 maggio 1800 nel Buxton, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Benjamin Coolbroth, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Fenderson, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mehitable Morrison nel 1824, nel Limerick, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1840 e nel Belfast, Waldo, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 10 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Royal B. Coolbrothが1800年5月8日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークブクストンで生まれた時，父Benjamin Coolbrothは31歳，母Elizabeth Fendersonは26歳であった。1824年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークリメリックでMehitable Morrisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1840年にはアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクニュー リメリックに，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ワルドベルファストに約10年間住んでいた。

ko.New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United S: 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭
ko.lifeSummary: Royal B. Coolbroth(이)가 1800년 5월 8일 미국 메인 주 요르크 버스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benjamin Coolbroth(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Fenderson(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1824년 미국 메인 주 요르크 라임릭에서 Mehitable Morrison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1840년도에 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭에서, 미국 메인 주 월도 벨파스트에서 약 10년 동안 살았다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Royal B. Coolbroth nasceu em 8 de maio de 1800, em Buxton, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Benjamin Coolbroth, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Fenderson, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mehitable Morrison em 1824, em Limerick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América em 1840 e em Belfast, Waldo, Maine, Estados Unidos da América por quase 10 anos.

ru.New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United S: ню лимирикк, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Royal B. Coolbroth родился 8 мая 1800 г. в местности букстон, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Benjamin Coolbroth было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fenderson, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mehitable Morrison в 1824 г. в местности лимирикк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности ню лимирикк, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в 1840 году и в местности белфаст, валдо, Мэн, Соединенные штаты около 10 лет.
